name: Ferplast Comb gO 5866
shortDescription: The FERPLAST COMB GRO 5866 is a professional-quality grooming tool designed to keep your pet’s coat healthy, shiny, and free from tangles. Perfect for both medium and long-haired dogs and cats, this comb combines functionality with comfort to make grooming a pleasant experience for both you and your furry friend
description: Key Features • Suitable for Dogs & Cats: Designed for pets with medium to long coats, helping you maintain a smooth, tangle-free finish. • Rounded Teeth: The specially shaped rounded ends protect your pet’s delicate skin from scratches or irritation. • Rotating Teeth: Each tooth can rotate to ease through knots and tangles, minimizing pulling and discomfort. • Ergonomic Plastic Handle: Comfortable to hold, providing a secure grip to make grooming sessions easier and more efficient. • Durable Build: Made with sturdy plastic and rubber components, ensuring long-lasting use and flexibility. Benefits • Removes knots, tangles, and dead hair effectively. • Reduces discomfort during grooming, making it ideal for pets with sensitive skin. • Helps maintain a shiny, healthy coat with regular use. • Minimizes shedding in your home by removing loose hair before it falls. Whether you’re maintaining your show pet’s coat or simply keeping your furry companion comfortable, the FERPLAST COMB GRO 5866 is a practical, durable, and gentle grooming solution.
